properties.remark: LAKE COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTS POWERLINES AND TREES DOWN ON THE ROAD AT THE INTERSECTION OF HONEYCUT ROAD AND TUSCANOOGA ROAD IN MASCOTTE.

UPDATE- LAKE COUNTY SHERIFFS OFFICE REPORTS POWERLINES AND TREES DOWN ON THE ROAD AT THE INTERSECTION OF HONEYCUT ROAD AND TUSCANOOGA ROAD IN MASCOTTE. ADDITIONAL REPORT RELAYED THROUGH FL EM OF STRUCTURAL DAMAGE TO A HOME ON 1800TH BLOCK OF TUSCANOOGA ROAD, AND REPORTS OF COWS LOOSE ON THE ROAD.

UPDATE - SEMINOLE COUNTY EM RELAYED DAMAGE TO BUILDINGS ALONG CHURCH STREET AND SUNRAIL DRIVE. ALSO, CENTRAL FLORIDA ZOO PRESS RELEASE STATED THERE WAS SIGNIFICANT TREE DAMAGE NEAR THE ENTRANCE OF THE ZOO. TIME ESTIMATED FROM RADAR. ALSO, LOCAL ROADCAST MEDIA ALSO REPORTED DAMAGE ALONG CHURCH STREET.
